name: Ribbed Glass Vanity Tray Clear - Threshold™
description: Step up your bathroom decor with this Ribbed Glass Vanity Tray from Threshold™. This glass vanity tray is designed with raised edges to ensure the contents don't come in contact with wet counters. Featuring a clear design with a ribbed exterior for textural flair, this decorative vanity tray brings vintage-inspired charm to your bath space. Use it to hold coordinating bath accessories, a washcloth or hand towel, as well as different makeup or grooming tools to bring organization to your bathroom or vanity decor.
